events.title: Humanitarian Data Challenge
events.description: Join us for a weekend datathon at CMU dedicated to solving critical challenges in global aid distribution. Working with real-world datasets from the United Nations and powered by Databricks, participants will develop analytical tools to improve how humanitarian resources are allocated and audited.

events.title: Poker AI Competition
events.description: Build an optimize an AI agent to play other competitors in heads-up poker with a mysterious twist. Compete for $6,000 in prizes and learn from industry experts and researchers from Jump Trading, our title sponsor.
